problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power may resolve Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
